intro: Anodontea dasycarpa, also known as the velvet trumpet, is a flowering plant in the Malvaceae family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties.
